description: Composition Red and black sleeveless jersey made of 100% polyester, has a V-neck, ribbed armholes, NBA logo applique on the left shoulder, embroidered branding on the right shoulder, printed branding on the front and player name printed on the back with the number Wash care Wash dark colours separately at less than 30 degrees Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; do not iron on print/trims/logo Authentic Miami Heat merchandise from adidas for fans of Lebron James. A Basketball lovers' dream come true, this jersey is as comfortable as it looks. Perfect to showcase your team attachment, wear this with your training gear for a basketball game!Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
